note: Run this command to get full schema: curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/graphql/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query": "query IntrospectionQuery { __schema { queryType { name } mutationType { name } types { ...FullType } } } fragment FullType on __Type { kind name description fields { name type { name kind ofType { name kind ofType { name } } } } }"}'
common_issues: Field names mismatch between frontend and backend
Argument names not following camelCase convention
Missing required fields in response types
debugging_steps: 1. Check frontend schema definition matches backend
2. Verify field names use camelCase convention
3. Ensure all required fields are present
4. Check for null vs undefined handling
